global_style: hyper-realistic cinematic low-magic Eastern epic, 16:9 landscape widescreen drama
shot_style_rules: Real body weight, contact reaction, and physical hand pressure must be visible.
Low magic appears as local worn gold-red traces in material cracks only.
The frame must avoid plastic CGI, over-smoothed faces, modern clothing, UI, visible dialogue text, and random readable glyphs.
The shot is a video reference frame with scene context, alpha forbidden, and no neutral card background.

accent: mist purple and cold grey sleeves

qc_rejection_rules: Reject if the alliance fragment is not the primary readable subject.
Reject if generated text, UI, watermark, subtitle, or invented emblem appears.
Reject if the frame becomes a generic character poster or generic snowy ruin.
Reject if foreground, midground, and background are not separated.
Reject if low-magic traces become large spells, beams, or clean sacred glow.
